overview: Modern Endocrine is an endocrinology practice led by Dr. Cassie Smith providing comprehensive and personalized care for hormonal imbalances, thyroid disorders, and metabolic health through a holistic approach addressing cellular health, nutrition, gut function, and lifestyle factors.
highlights: In-office thyroid biopsies (FNA procedure with minimal downtime)
targetAudience: Patients seeking treatment for thyroid disorders, hormonal imbalances, metabolic conditions like insulin resistance and PCOS, and related endocrine health concerns.
